funds.thesis_summary: Network effects platform investing. NFX focuses on defensible businesses with network effects, marketplaces, and platforms. Strong thesis on gaming as a social platform and crypto-enabled economies.
strategic_positioning_notes: NFX has a dedicated gaming practice and understands UGC/moderated economies
Strong network effects thesis aligns with AI-generated content ecosystems
Gigi Levy-Weiss specifically interested in frontier tech at intersection of crypto and gaming
They lead rounds and move fast on conviction - ideal for pre-seed/seed stage
Portfolio includes several successful gaming exits (exit to Epic, etc.)

funds.thesis_summary: European seed-stage focused on gaming, AI, and frontier tech. Founded by ex-Epic Games/Atomico team. Deep operational expertise in game development and live service operations.
strategic_positioning_notes: Founded by ex-Epic Games execs - deep game industry DNA
Strong European gaming network (Supercell, King, etc. alumni)
Specific interest in AI-generated content and AI NPCs
Leading investor in AI-gaming convergence thesis
Mattias Ljungman has specific interest in infrastructure plays over pure content

funds.thesis_summary: Polish/European seed fund focused on gaming, AI, and crypto. Strong thesis on Eastern European technical talent and emerging markets. B2B infrastructure preferred over B2C content plays.
strategic_positioning_notes: Deep network in Eastern European dev talent (Poland, Ukraine, Baltics)
Borys specifically interested in crypto-gaming infrastructure over speculation
Strong focus on B2B tools and middleware
Smaller check sizes but willing to lead pre-seed rounds
Good for validation and early traction funding

funds.thesis_summary: Gaming and entertainment-focused fund with strong crypto thesis. Remagine specifically targets the intersection of gaming, web3, and AI. Deep network in Israeli tech and European gaming.
strategic_positioning_notes: One of the few funds with explicit crypto-gaming thesis
Kevin Brown has been vocal about AI + blockchain convergence
Portfolio includes multiple infrastructure plays (Stardust, Oasys)
Strong Israeli network - relevant for technical hiring
Understands regulatory landscape for crypto gaming

funds.thesis_summary: Crypto-native fund focused on web3 infrastructure and applications. 1kx has a strong gaming thesis viewing blockchain as essential infrastructure for player-owned economies and open gaming ecosystems.
recent_ai_investments: Several AI x crypto convergence plays
strategic_positioning_notes: Pure crypto-native fund - no fiat/gaming VC equivocation
Lasse Clausen specifically interested in autonomous worlds and on-chain games
Thesis: AI agents will need crypto rails for coordination and value exchange
Strong technical team that evaluates protocol design deeply
Good fit for infrastructure-heavy plays with token components
